name: Herb Płocka
description: Coat of arms of Płock (Herb Płocka), a historic city on the Vistula River and the former capital of the Duchy of Masovia in the 11th and 12th centuries. The shield bears a black bear and a golden eagle, referencing the city's ducal heritage.
blazon: Per fess: in chief gules, a bear passant sable; in base azure, an eagle displayed or, crowned or
